free_text: Cross sections for the production of radionuclides in
copper target irradiated with 660 MeV protons
50 cm3 Ge(Li) with 2.2 keV resolution at
The stack has contained three aluminum and three
copper foils. All foils have diameter 20 mm.
The measurements were begun after 50 minutes
of end of irradiation, approximately. These
measurements have been continued during to 7 days.
Second cycle of the measurements has been executed
-By Compiler- The experience of another authors
